form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by one length over 515m at this track (30.03). Can make it two on the bounce.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by one length over 515m at this track (30.03). Can make it two on the bounce.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 401m at Richmond beaten 7 lengths (23.65) behind True Request in a Grade 5 on March 13. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th over 401m at Richmond beaten 7 lengths (23.65) behind True Request in a Grade 5 on March 13. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 19 length eighth at Wentworth Park (31.06) in a Grade 5. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 19 length eighth at Wentworth Park (31.06) in a Grade 5. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished fifth on April 8 over 520m at Richmond behind Gull Wing, beaten 8 lengths (30.51) in a Mix. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Last start finished fifth on April 8 over 520m at Richmond behind Gull Wing, beaten 8 lengths (30.51) in a Mix. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 401m at Richmond. Looks up against it this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 401m at Richmond. Looks up against it this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start came together , losing momentum.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won comfortably by 6 lengths at Richmond (30.18) beating Betty Bullpit in a Maiden on March 29. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won comfortably by 6 lengths at Richmond (30.18) beating Betty Bullpit in a Maiden on March 29. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn came together.
Shortly after the start came together.

form.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins together. Had plenty of support last start when she won by 2 lengths at Maitland (24.97) beating Spencer Banner in a Grade 5 on April 6. Flying lately and can score again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins together. Had plenty of support last start when she won by 2 lengths at Maitland (24.97) beating Spencer Banner in a Grade 5 on April 6. Flying lately and can score again.

form.formComment: Going well and has been in the placings at his past six starts. Finished 3rd in a Mix on April 10 over 515m at The Gardens behind Sergeant Duker beaten 3 lengths (30.36). Deserves a win and is expected to run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together ounding the turn into the back straight and shifted wide.
